name: F5 BIG-IP iRule — XSS Baseline
objective: Detect and block common cross-site scripting payload markers in URI and query components with an F5 BIG-IP iRule baseline.
risk_mitigated: Reflected and stored XSS payload delivery against forms, search inputs, and administrative interfaces.
potential_side_effects: Endpoints that legitimately carry HTML fragments or rich text may need scoped exclusions or a log-first rollout.
tuning_notes: Limit early deployment to unauthenticated routes and admin entry points. Exclude known-safe WYSIWYG or content management paths after observing traffic.
deployment_notes: Deploy in a validation window on non-production listeners or mirrored traffic where possible. Promote gradually by hostname or application pool.
monitoring_notes: Review matches that include encoded angle brackets, script tags, or inline event handlers. Compare block volume with application error rates during rollout.
